title: Social Fridge

description.paragraph1: My fridge started automatically posting recipes using what's inside it. Now it has followers. Many followers.
description.paragraph2: The fridge door screen, the mobile app, refrigerator displays, and smart glasses need to show the same recipes… but each in a different way.
description.paragraph3: After the last update, the fridge screen started showing hamster food ads on every cake recipe.

bullet_point.bullet1: Recipes need to appear on several different devices that share the same structural pattern.
bullet_point.bullet2: The system's code is [b]difficult to analyze[/b]. I want to change the appearance without rewriting the logic.
bullet_point.bullet3: The AI that programmed this mixed recipe buttons with temperature control. Must improve [b]usability[/b].

footnote: [i]~ My fridge has more followers than me. And I post food photos too.[/i]

bug1.description: We need to change the interfaces. Which part of the system should be modified to change only the application's appearance?
